title: Book Of Nonsense Limerick 100.
content:
There was a Young Lady of Sweden,
    Who went by the slow train to Weedon;
    When they cried, "Weedon Station!"
    She made no observation,
    But thought she should go back to Sweden.
meaning:
"Book Of Nonsense Limerick 100." is a quintessential example of Edward Lear's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
